Home
Automation

Workflow Automation

Real automation scenarios where multi-agent orchestration replaces manual processes. Each workflow chains specialized agents into end-to-end pipelines.

Quality Available

Automated Code Audit

Agents watch for changes, audit quality, security, and a11y — then suggest or apply fixes automatically.

code-reviewer a11y-specialist debugger git-manager
End-to-End Available

PO-to-Prototype Pipeline

Product Owner describes a feature in plain language. Agents plan, prototype, audit, fix, and deliver a working branch.

planner fullstack-developer code-reviewer tester git-manager
Ideation Available

Brainstorming Flow

From idea to spike — brainstormer generates options, planner evaluates feasibility, developer creates a proof-of-concept.

brainstormer planner fullstack-developer muji
Maintenance Planned

Cross-Branch Fix Propagation

Fix a bug once. Agents detect the same pattern in other branches and apply the fix — or open PRs for review.

debugger code-reviewer git-manager
CI/CD Planned

Continuous Quality Loop

Agents monitor code health metrics — coverage, a11y score, bundle size, lint — and proactively fix regressions.

tester a11y-specialist code-reviewer git-manager
Tracking Planned

Development Dashboard

Automatic progress tracking from agent outputs — plan status, velocity, quality metrics, activity logs. Zero manual reporting.

project-manager journal-writer planner
